bannedPhraseRegistry.reason: Absolute proof framing usually weakens academic validity unless explicitly contrasted as a flawed draft.
Sample-size-only bias removal is an intentionally bad distractor and should not leak into passages.
Overstrong modal phrasing should remain confined to distractors.
Repeated explanatory formula can make rationales feel templated.
Generic opening creates weak rhetorical texture.

limitations: This is an automated review queue, not completed expert adjudication.
Semantic similarity uses lexical shingles and should be interpreted as a triage signal.
Priority labels guide manual review effort; they do not automatically retire items.

items.assessmentConstruct: integrate passage claims while respecting scope and evidence strength
